executive_summary.finding: Multiple ServiceWorkers registered in browser that enable surveillance by actors with network access
executive_summary.primary_actor: Jorge Jimenez - Senior Network Engineer, Kyndryl
immediate_actions_required: Clear browser profile or switch browsers

1_kyndryl_gtm.connection: Jorge Jimenez is Senior Network Engineer at Kyndryl
1_kyndryl_gtm.capability: CrossSite tracking across 32+ domains using GTM
injection_vector: Jorge's Google account signed into Android Smart TV
TV syncs browsing data/cookies across devices
MITM at router level injecting SW registrations
Evofusion 4K stick may be the attack device
1_kyndryl_gtm.jorge_location: Allegedly in Canada, but this is his house
1_kyndryl_gtm.attack_hypothesis: SW injected via compromised Android TV or router MITM

2_airbnb_partytown_co.issue: Colombian domain (.com.co) registered for Costa Rica user
2_airbnb_partytown_co.capability: Intercept ALL third-party scripts, inject malicious code

3_ubereats_order_tracking.actor_statement: Jorge said 'they know when orders come through the app'
3_ubereats_order_tracking.capability: Real-time awareness of food delivery timing for harassment coordination

opera_aria_ai.concern: Opera owned by Chinese company (Kunlun Tech). All AI queries routed through Opera servers.
opera_aria_ai.recommendation: Disable Aria, use alternative AI in separate browser

gtm_crosssite_mesh.tracking_capability: All sites share data through Google infrastructure
gtm_crosssite_mesh.fingerprinting: Device/browser fingerprint persistent across all domains

immediate.target: Identify extensions ebongfb... and enegjkb..., disable/remove if suspicious

short_term: Create new browser profile with minimal extensions
Install uBlock Origin to block GTM
Use VPN to bypass ISP-level manipulation
long_term: Report to relevant authorities with technical evidence
Use separate device for sensitive communications
